description: PAGE FOUR The East Hartford Gazette The East Hartford Gazette is published by the West Hartford Publishing Company Bice Clemow President Established in 1884 by Henry B Hale the Gazette is published every Thursday at 1128 Main Street East Hartford Connecti cut Entered as second class matter a the Post Office in Hart ford on December 2 1942 under the Act of March 3 1879 John G Rohrbach Publisher John W McLean Editor Michael Ahearn Managing Editor Joyce Rossignol Womens Editor Al Fedu Photographer All news contributions and communications should be addressed to the East Hartford Gazette 1128 Main Street East Hartford Tiephone JAckson 82194 Subscription Rates 300 per year 550 for two years 750 for three years Servicemen and Teachers 200 per year Col lege Subscriptions 200 for ten months Goodbye To 59 Hello To 6O With the last day of old 1959 the Gazette casts a tra ditional backward glance at what weve been up to over the past 52 weeks or put more accurately what East Hartfords been up to in the way of news and activity Our purpose is not sim ply to indulge our nostalgia though thats part of it but rather to suggest as
